findings.description: Advisory warning text lost bold formatting and visual scale
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the main warning paragraph starting with 'Eating raw...' is rendered in a massive, bold font to serve as a highly visible poster. In the HTML, it is rendered as standard, unbolded body text, losing its intended visual impact.
The PDF content is entirely center-aligned for poster visibility, whereas the HTML content is left-aligned.

findings.description: Penalty notice text lost bold formatting and scale
findings.evidence: The PDF displays the 'Failure to post...' paragraph in large, bold font. The HTML conversion (which flowed this text onto the first page) renders it as standard, unbolded body text.
